description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a medium build, depicted in a neutral standing pose with arms extended horizontally. The individual is dressed in a collared, zip-up jacket with subtle seam detailing and a pair of straight-cut pants. The jacket features a small emblem or text on the left chest area, adding a touch of character to the otherwise simple attire. The figure's shoes are low-profile and practical, suitable for walking in urban environments. The hairstyle is medium-length, wavy, and parted to the side, framing the face and neck. The overall appearance is casual and appropriate for everyday city life.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian in a zip-up jacket and straight pants, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has medium-length wavy hair and practical shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, jacket details, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair volume, and the straight fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, hair, and symmetrical arm extension.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm, and leg alignment.
attribute_clothing_type: collared zip-up jacket and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length wavy hair parted to the side
